data.body: Preflight complete: epic jira-reb-1160 is open and decomposed into seven direct code-changing story leaves at depth 1. Dependency order: acaf pins first; 75de validity, 5967 phase, and 7c27 prerequisite criterion after pins; 2bbd close gate after validity+phase; cb6b surfaces after validity+phase+close; 145e rollout after close+criterion+surfaces. Created isolated worktree /private/tmp/rebar-jira-reb-1160 on branch feature-jira-reb-1160 from origin/main d5fdbdc56; worktree .venv and pre-commit/commit-msg hooks verified. Selected the documented Gerrit feature-branch workflow. BLOCKED before claim/code: Gerrit rejected creation of refs/heads/feature/jira-reb-1160 because RebarBotNava lacks Create Reference permission. No ticket claimed and no code edited. Required operator action: a feature-branch driver creates feature/jira-reb-1160 from current main or grants RebarBotNava feature-branch-drivers membership, then resume this session.
